title: AI in research: we need to stop treating every AI-related issue as misconduct
abstract: Stop wasting time on witch hunts! Use **AI in research: we need to stop treating every AI-related issue as misconduct** for real productivity boosts! 🚀🔍
abstract_zh: 给你们安利个超赞的AI工具：**AI in research: we need to stop treating every AI-related issue as misconduct**。这玩意儿简直是个效率小能手！比如你在写周报时突然发现数据有误，调Bug到怀疑人生，别急，输入你的问题，它立马给你专业且公正的建议。再也不怕别人说你是“AI作怪”了！快来试试吧，让你的工作事半功倍
